# Sherpa Capital Group

> Boutique private equity real estate firm providing bridge debt and equity investments secured by commercial real estate. Based in Chicago, IL. Founded 2010.

## About

Sherpa Capital Group is an entrepreneurial direct lending platform specializing in commercial real estate bridge loans and selective equity investments. The firm provides fast, flexible financing for commercial real estate transactions across the United States, with loan amounts from $500K to $10MM and closings in 1-4 weeks.

## Services

- **Bridge Loans**: Short-term commercial real estate loans. Loan sizes $500K–$10MM, LTV flexible, interest rates 9–13%, terms 6–24 months, first lien position collateral.
- **Equity Investments**: Selective equity investments in commercial real estate opportunities across the US.

## Team

- **Rahul Shah** — Co-Founder & Managing Principal
- **Ashish Parikh** — Co-Founder & Managing Principal

## Portfolio

Over 35 funded commercial real estate transactions across Chicago, New York, Georgia, Florida, Texas, and other US markets. Property types include multifamily, mixed-use, retail, office, hotel, and construction financing.
